_notes: Manually-confirmed events for this server. Used to fill gaps and corrections in the Google Calendar feed (data/calendar.json), which is the authoritative-but-incomplete source. Append-only log: keep historical entries so a future projection script can detect weekly recurrence patterns. Date convention: end is EXCLUSIVE (matches iCal all-day convention used by parse_calendar.py).
